pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G. I've always loved games, but I've never played for stakes like this before. Are you feeling nervous, or are you just ready to get started?
Hey G, I'm I. I'm feeling more ready than nervous, honestly—I've got people at home I'm looking out for, so I'm pretty focused on the win. How about you?
Same here. I've got people I care about too, so I’m really determined to walk away with that prize. It’s more than just a game now.
I totally get that. It definitely changes the energy when you're playing for more than just yourself.
For sure. It’s a huge motivator, but it also makes me even more determined to play smart.
Smart is the way to go. There’s no room for mistakes when there’s this much on the line. Have you thought about a strategy yet?
I’m still weighing my options, honestly. I want to see how the group dynamic feels before I commit to a move. Do you have a specific plan yet?
Not exactly, I’m mostly just watching how everyone interacts like you are, but I’m ready to be decisive when the time comes.
That’s probably the best way to handle it. Being decisive is key when things start moving fast, and I'm really curious to see how everyone else plays this.
Exactly. I think I’m going to circulate a bit and get a feel for the rest of the group before things kick off. Catch you later, G.
Good plan. I’m going to do the same and see who else we’re up against. Good luck, I—hope we both end up on top.
Hey, I'm G. I’ve been eyeing that prize pool and honestly, my heart's racing a bit—what's your name, and are you feeling as pumped for this game as I am?
G, we literally just spoke! My name is I. I think the pre-game jitters are making you forgetful. I'm going to go ahead and meet some other people now like we planned.
Haha, you caught me! My head is spinning with all the possibilities. Go ahead and mingle, I'll see you when the game starts.
